product_overview: A cross-platform web interface for Donkey Car tub and configuration management that replicates the original Kivy Tub Manager features in the browser. It provides configuration and tub loading, record navigation and playback, interactive charts, and data cleaning tools on a single main console page.
core_goals: Provide a desktop-focused, cross-platform web replacement for the Donkey Car Kivy UI accessible via the main console at /
Allow users to load car configuration and tub data directories and surface load status and record counts
Enable efficient browsing and playback of tub records with image preview and playback controls
Visualize steering/throttle (and other) time-series data as interactive charts that synchronize with the navigator
Offer tools for filtering, deleting, and restoring record ranges with clear confirmations and status feedback

features.name: Config Loader
features.description: Allow users to point the app at a car configuration directory and load configuration values so the UI and downstream features know the car context.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View config path input field -> Modify config path to ~/mycar -> Click Load button to load configuration -> See success message indicating config loaded -> Status bar updates to show loaded config path

Navigate to / -> View config path input field -> Modify config path to /invalid/path -> Click Load button to load configuration -> See error message if loading fails -> Status bar shows 'No config loaded'

features.name: Tub Loader
features.description: Let users select a tub (data) directory and load tub metadata (record_count, fields) so records and charts can be displayed.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View tub path input field -> Modify tub path to ./data -> Click Load button to load tub data -> See loading indicator -> See success message with record_count and fields -> Status bar shows record count
Navigate to / -> View tub path input field -> Modify tub path to /nonexistent/tub -> Click Load button to load tub data -> See error message if loading fails -> Status bar shows 'No tub loaded'

features.name: Tub Navigator
features.description: Browse tub records with image preview, record metadata, and playback controls (play/pause/prev/next/first/last). Supports chart-driven navigation and displays playback speed and FPS.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View current record image -> Click Play button to start playback -> Observe playback advances frames and FPS display updates -> Click Pause button to stop playback -> Click Next button to advance one record -> Click Last button to jump to end -> Drag on chart to navigate to specific record -> See current record image update to selected record

Navigate to / -> View current record image -> Click Play button to start playback -> Backend fails to return image (GET /api/tub/image) -> See broken image placeholder or error notification -> Click Pause button -> See playback stopped and error message displayed

features.name: Tub Chart
features.description: Render interactive line charts for steering and throttle (and other numeric fields). Charts show tooltips, allow clicking/dragging to navigate records, and display a current-position indicator.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View line chart with steering and throttle data -> Hover over chart to see tooltip with values -> Click on chart at a timestamp to navigate to specific record -> See current position indicator move -> Tub Navigator updates to the selected record
Navigate to / -> View line chart area -> Chart data is empty or failed to load -> See empty-chart placeholder and error message prompting to load tub data

features.name: Data Cleaner
features.description: Provide filtering and index-range based deletion/restore controls to clean tub data. Actions require confirmation and update the loaded record set and charts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Data Cleaner panel -> Set temporary filter expression user_throttle>0.1 -> Click Apply filter -> See filtered record count -> Select index range start 10 end 20 -> Click Delete button -> Confirm deletion in modal -> See success message and updated record count and chart
Navigate to / -> Open Data Cleaner panel -> Set an invalid filter expression -> Click Apply filter -> See validation error message -> Fix filter or cancel

features.name: Status Bar
features.description: Display current application state such as loaded config path, loaded tub path, and total record count so users have persistent status context.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe status bar shows loaded config path, loaded tub path, and total record count when data is loaded
Navigate to / -> Observe status bar shows 'No data loaded' or a warning when no config or tub data has been successfully loaded

routes.description: Main application page with all components

features.name: Config Loader
user_interactions: Click Load button to load configuration
See error message if loading fails

features.name: Tub Loader
features.description: Load tub data records from car directory
user_interactions: Click Load button to load tub data
See error message if loading fails

features.name: Tub Navigator
features.description: Navigate and playback tub records with images
user_interactions: Click Play button to start playback
Click Pause button to stop playback
Click First/Last buttons to jump to start/end
Drag on chart to navigate to specific record
View playback speed and FPS display

features.name: Tub Chart
features.description: Display steering and throttle data as interactive chart
user_interactions: View line chart with steering and throttle data
Hover over chart to see tooltip with values
Click on chart to navigate to specific record
See current position indicator on chart

known_limitations.issue: Application requires backend API running on port 8000
known_limitations.impact: All features will fail without backend

known_limitations.issue: Default paths are hardcoded to specific user directory
known_limitations.impact: May not work for different users without modification

known_limitations.issue: No error handling for missing image data
known_limitations.impact: May display broken image if image data is invalid
